description_long: This bungalow is a compact residential building set on a rectangular green plot, featuring a prominent gable roof with a reddish-brown color. The front facade includes a small porch with steps leading up to the main entrance, flanked by two windows. The side elevations reveal a two-story structure with additional windows and a simple, clean wall finish in a beige tone. The rear of the bungalow is plain, with no visible doors or windows, while the opposite side mirrors the window arrangement of the first. The roof is steeply pitched, and the overall design is functional, with minimal decorative elements. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from wood and concrete, with glass windows and a tiled roof.
description: A beige, two-story bungalow with a red gable roof, front porch, and symmetrical window arrangement, set on a green plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, main entrance, and two front-facing windows beneath the gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the two-story profile, additional windows, and the depth of the porch structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall with no visible windows or doors, and the full span of the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two windows on the upper story and one on the lower, mirroring the other side.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows, regular side windows
